title: Call Metrics Dashboard
description: Real-time visibility into call volume, connect rates, talk time, and disposition — across every rep, team, and campaign.

title: Rep Performance Scoring
description: AI-scored calls based on talk time, objection handling, and close rate. Know exactly who needs coaching and who's ready to lead.

title: Team Leaderboards
description: Live leaderboards that drive healthy competition. Track dials, connects, appointments set, and policies written across your agency.

title: Conversion Tracking
description: Follow every lead from first dial to closed policy. See which campaigns, lists, and reps actually produce revenue — not just activity.

title: Call Recording Analytics
description: Every call recorded and analyzed. AI surfaces the moments that matter — objections handled, buying signals missed, compliance risks flagged.

title: Pipeline Velocity
description: Measure how fast leads move through your pipeline. Identify bottlenecks, stalled deals, and the exact stage where prospects drop off.

title: Campaign ROI Tracking
description: Connect ad spend directly to closed policies. Know which lead sources are profitable and which are burning budget before it's too late.

title: Power Dialer
description: Multi-line parallel dialing that lets one rep do the work of five. Dramatically increase contact rate and call volume without adding headcount.

title: Local Presence
description: Automatically dial from local area codes so prospects see a familiar number. Higher answer rates mean more conversations and more policies written.

title: Call Queue Management
description: AI builds and manages your call queue automatically. Old leads that didn't answer get recycled back into rotation — nothing falls through the cracks.

title: Voicemail Drop
description: Pre-recorded voicemails dropped with one click. Move to the next dial instantly instead of waiting for the beep — reclaim hours every week.

title: Click-to-Call
description: Dial any number from your CRM, browser, or lead list with a single click. No copy-pasting, no manual dialing, no wasted seconds between calls.

title: Speed-to-Lead
description: New leads hit your dialer the moment they come in. First to call wins in insurance — Consuelo makes sure that's always your team.

title: Lead Disbursement
description: Distribute a thousand leads across five reps with one click. Round-robin, weighted, or manual — each agent gets exactly their leads, no overlap.

title: Call Transfer
description: Warm and cold transfers that keep the conversation flowing. Hand off to closers, managers, or specialists without dropping the prospect.

title: TCPA Compliance
description: Built-in TCPA safeguards for every outbound call. Time-zone restrictions, consent tracking, and calling-hour enforcement — compliance by default.

title: DNC List Management
description: Automatic Do-Not-Call list scrubbing before every dial session. Federal, state, and internal DNC lists checked in real time so you never call someone who opted out.

title: Call Recording Consent
description: Automated consent announcements for two-party states. The system knows which states require disclosure and handles it before your rep says a word.

title: Role-Based Access
description: Agents see their leads. Managers see their team. Admins see everything. Granular permissions that match how your agency actually operates.

title: Spam Shield
description: Automatic number rotation and caller ID health monitoring. Keep your numbers clean and your answer rates high — no more flagged or blocked calls.

title: Data Export & Portability
description: Your data is yours. Export contacts, call logs, recordings, and analytics anytime in standard formats. No vendor lock-in, no hostage data.

title: End-to-End Encryption
description: All call data, recordings, and customer information encrypted in transit and at rest. Enterprise-grade security without the enterprise price tag.

title: GoHighLevel
description: Works inside GHL as a native embedded app. Your team dials, coaches, and manages leads without ever leaving the GoHighLevel dashboard.

title: Salesforce Import
description: Migrate your entire Salesforce org in minutes. Contacts, companies, pipeline stages, and custom fields — mapped and imported automatically.

title: Zapier
description: Connect Consuelo to 5,000+ apps through Zapier. Trigger workflows, sync data, and automate the busywork between your tools.

title: Webhook API
description: Real-time webhooks for every event — calls, dispositions, lead updates, recordings. Build custom integrations that react the moment something happens.

title: CSV Import & Export
description: Bulk import leads from any source and export your data anytime. Standard CSV format means your data works everywhere, not just here.

title: REST API
description: Full REST API for everything Consuelo does. Build custom dashboards, connect internal tools, or automate your entire sales workflow programmatically.

title: Ads to CRM
description: Connect your ads platform straight to your CRM. Leads from campaigns flow directly into your pipeline — no CSV exports, no manual imports.

title: Onboarding Assistance
description: Dedicated onboarding that gets your team dialing on day one. We migrate your data, configure your dialer, and train your reps — not just hand you docs.

title: Knowledge Base
description: Searchable docs, video walkthroughs, and step-by-step guides for every feature. Find answers fast without waiting for a support ticket.

title: Live Chat Support
description: Real humans, not chatbots. Get help from someone who actually knows the product — available when you need it, not when a queue says so.

title: Training Webinars
description: Weekly live sessions covering power dialer tactics, AI coaching setup, and pipeline management. Your team gets better every week, not just at onboarding.

title: Community Forum
description: Connect with other insurance sales teams using Consuelo. Share scripts, strategies, and workflows that actually work in the field.

title: Open Source Transparency
description: Consuelo is open source. Inspect the code, suggest features, report bugs, and know exactly what's running your sales operation. No black boxes.
